name: caspian-email-functions
description: Firebase Cloud Functions for Caspian Store transactional email. Reads the enabled email provider plugin from Firestore (`emailPluginInstalls`) and delegates sending. v8.0.0+: API keys are loaded from Google Secret Manager — run `firebase functions:secrets:set CASPIAN_EMAIL_<PROVIDER>_API_KEY` before deploy.

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
